points.title: Cave Temple Complex
points.description: Five magnificent caves carved into a massive granite outcrop, each containing ancient Buddhist art and statues.

points.title: Devaraja Lena (Cave 1)
points.description: Cave of the Divine King featuring the magnificent 14-meter reclining Buddha statue hewn from rock.

points.title: Maharaja Viharaya (Cave 2)
points.description: The largest cave with 56 Buddha statues, intricate ceiling frescoes, and statues of Kings Valagamba and Nissanka Malla.

points.title: Maha Alut Vihara (Cave 3)
points.description: Great New Monastery with 50 Buddha statues and Kandy-style paintings from King Kirti Sri Rajasinha's reign.

points.title: Ancient Frescoes & Murals
points.description: Over 2,100 square meters of well-preserved paintings covering cave ceilings depicting Buddha's life and Jataka tales.

points.title: Golden Temple Museum
points.description: Modern museum at the base featuring Buddhist art, artifacts, and the iconic golden Buddha statue.

points.title: Sacred Spring
points.description: Natural spring in Cave 2 that drips healing water from a crack in the ceiling, considered sacred by pilgrims.
